common.lang_toggle_aria: Switch language between English and Japanese
common.no_js_directory: This directory needs JavaScript. Please enable it or browse the JSON in {path}.
common.no_js_search: This search needs JavaScript. The agent fixtures live in {path}.
common.no_js_map: This page needs JavaScript. The data is in {path}.
common.no_js_detail: This page requires JavaScript to render agent profiles dynamically from JSON data.
common.no_js_detail_fallback: Return to the {link}, or browse the raw agent data in {path}.

index.title: Realm Directory · Meet the Realm
index.meta_description: A directory of {total} specialist agents — search, filter by category, class, and project affinity, and explore the Realm.
index.hero_tagline: {total} specialist agents. Search by capability, filter by category, class, or project affinity, and find the right specialist in seconds.

detail.title: Realm Directory · Agent Detail
detail.meta_description: Detailed agent profile — capabilities, collaboration map, and example invocations.
detail.recipes_intro: Invoke a Recipe with {code}. The default Recipe runs when no subcommand is specified.
detail.recipes_empty: No recipes declared. Use {code} to invoke with a natural-language prompt.
detail.invocation_help_with_recipes: Invoke the agent's default Recipe with the natural-language prompt above, or pick one of {count} Recipes via {code} — see the {recipes_tab} tab.
detail.invocation_help_no_recipes: Invoke the agent's default Recipe with the natural-language prompt above.

category.title: Realm Directory · Category
category.meta_description: A category of Realm agents grouped by archetype and class bonus.
category.collab_hint: Hub and spokes show how agents in this category typically chain. The center node is the most-connected agent in the category.
category.when_pattern_text: Reach for this category when the user need maps to the category's signature trait.
category.when_handoff_text: The class bonus is realized when chained with the agents listed in the collaboration tab.
category.when_avoid_text: Production hardening / shared-core refactors → route to {builder} or {artisan}.

map.title: Realm Directory · Agent Network Map
map.meta_description: A network map of all Realm agents grouped by class, with collaboration links revealed on focus.
map.hero_lead: All agents organized by class. Hover or focus a node to reveal its collaboration links — blue arrows are inputs, green arrows are outputs. Click to open the agent detail.

search.title: Realm Directory · Search
search.meta_description: Search and filter Realm agents by name, capability, category, class, and project affinity.
